users.formPageSubtitle: Create a user account and link branch and roles as needed.
users.formWorkflowNote: Username, email, password, and Arabic name are required — the rest is optional.
users.sectionIdentitySubtitle: Display name, account status, and expiration.
users.sectionLinkingSubtitle: Link the user to fleet and branch when needed.
users.sectionPermissionsSubtitle: Select one or more roles to define user access.
users.privileges.pageSubtitle: View the user and manage direct privileges assigned to them.
users.privileges.formWorkflowNote: Username is read-only — privileges are optional and can be changed anytime.
users.privileges.sectionUserSubtitle: The user whose privileges will be updated.
users.privileges.sectionPermissionsSubti: Select the direct privileges this user should have.
users.privileges.hintUser: Username is shown for reference only and cannot be edited here.
users.privileges.hintPermissions: Search, select visible, or clear all — all privileges are optional.
users.privileges.noPrivilegesDefined: No privileges are defined in the system.
Arabic user name is required and must be: Arabic user name is required and must be valid.
Create and manage user accounts, expirat: Create and manage user accounts, expiration dates, and assigned roles.
Create fleet first, then bind user + rol: Create fleet first, then bind user + role to keep access scope clean.
English user name must be valid.
Fleet is required for super admin user c: Fleet is required for super admin user creation.
Optional, you can leave fleet empty or provide a value when needed.
Hint User Active: Enable this when the user should be allowed to sign in and use the system.
Hint User Branch: Optional, choose the branch linked to this user when needed.
Hint User Arabic Name: Enter the full Arabic name exactly as it should appear in the system.
Hint User Email: Enter a valid email address for sign-in or notifications.
Hint User English Name: Optional, but recommended for English-facing screens and reports.
Hint User Expiration Date: Optional, and useful when the account should expire on a specific date.
Hint User Password: Use a clear and secure password for the new user.
Hint User Roles: Select one or more roles to define the user access level inside the system.
Hint Username: Use a unique username with English letters, numbers, dashes, or underscores.
Super admin must choose the fleet for th: Super admin must choose the fleet for this user account.
